title: Parameters cannot be used in RHS of input port (default value)

features.name: parameter_in_input_port_default
features.description: Code should include a module with a parameter used in the default value expression of an input port
features.snippet:
module Foo #(parameter F) (input logic i = F);
endmodule

features.name: parameter_cast_in_input_port_default
features.description: Code should include a module with a cast expression using a parameter in the default value of an input port
features.snippet:
module Foo #(parameter F) (input logic i = F'(1));
endmodule

features.name: parameter_in_output_port_default
features.description: Code should include a module with a parameter used in the default value expression of an output port
features.snippet:
module Foo #(parameter F) (output logic o = F);
endmodule
